hint: Hold up 1 finger on each hand — count them all!
Hold up 1 finger, then 2 more — count them all!
Start at 2, count one more: 3!
Double 2! Two pairs make 4.
Start at 3, count up 2: 4, 5!
Start at 3, count up 2: 4, 5!
Start at 4, count one more: 5!
Start at 4, count one more: 5!
Double 3! Like two tricycles — 6 wheels!
Start at 5, count one more: 6!
Start at 5 (the bigger one), count up 1: 6!
Start at 5, count up 2: 6, 7!
Start at 5 (the bigger one), count up 2: 6, 7!
Start at 5, count up 3: 6, 7, 8!
Double 4! A spider has 8 legs — that's 4 + 4.
Two high-fives! 5 + 5 = 10.
Count the sides — 1, 2, 3!

description: I am perfectly round with no corners at all.
hint: No corners, no sides — it rolls like a ball!

description: I have 4 equal sides and 4 square corners.
hint: All 4 sides are the same length — like a window!

description: I have 4 sides — 2 long ones and 2 short ones.
hint: Like a door — taller than it is wide.

description: I look like an egg — round but stretched out.
hint: Like a circle that got stretched longer!

description: I have 4 sides and stand on one point like a kite.
hint: A square tilted on its point!

description: I look like a slice of pizza!
hint: Count the edges of that pizza slice — 3!

description: I look like a wheel — perfectly round.
hint: A wheel is flat and round — no corners!

description: I have 3 sides and look like a mountain peak.
hint: Mountains have a pointy peak — 3 sides!

description: I look like a book cover — longer than I am wide.
hint: Two long sides and two short sides!

description: I look like a coin — flat and round.
hint: Coins are perfectly round!

description: I look like a tent — pointy on top, flat on the bottom.
hint: A tent has a peak — count the sides!

description: I look like a clock face — no corners anywhere.
hint: Clocks are round!

description: I have 4 equal sides but my corners are NOT square.
hint: Like a square leaning to the side — tilted!
Just counting up! What comes after 3?
Counting up by 1! What comes after 4?
Keep counting! What comes after 6?
Almost there! What comes after 9?
Counting by 2s! Skip one number each time!
Counting by 2s starting from 1! Odd numbers.
Counting down! 5, 4, 3, 2!
Counting backwards! Like a rocket launch countdown!
Each number appears twice! 1,1 then 2,2 then 3,?
It goes back and forth! 1, 2, 1, 2, 1, ?
